info.DAtuviSezaH: guptijkidByaH san 3.1.5 ityanena nindAyAm svArTe san-pratyayaH  anyezu arTezu tu curAdigaRavat rUpARi Bavanti
info.english_meaning: to protect to conceal to hide to blame to criticize
info.hindI_arTa: bacAnA saMrakzaRa karanA CipAnA doza lagAnA nindA karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ( nindArTe san ) ' RO gopayati BAzArTe  nindAyAm se jugupsate  gopayed rakzaRe tvAye vyAkulatve tu gupyati ' (Slo. 129) iti devaH  ' gopanakutsanayoH ' iti mEtreyarakzitO
